mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_daily_data (stock_code, stock_name, trade_date, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, amount, change_pct, change_amount, turnover_rate, amplitude, data_source, created_at) VALUES (#{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{tradeDate}, #{openPrice}, #{highPrice}, #{lowPrice}, #{closePrice}, #{volume}, #{amount}, #{changePct}, #{changeAmount}, #{turnoverRate}, #{amplitude}, #{dataSource}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO stock_daily_data (stock_code, stock_name, trade_date, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, amount, change_pct, change_amount, turnover_rate, amplitude, data_source, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.stockCode}, #{item.stockName}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.openPrice}, #{item.highPrice}, #{item.lowPrice}, #{item.closePrice}, #{item.volume}, #{item.amount}, #{item.changePct}, #{item.changeAmount}, #{item.turnoverRate}, #{item.amplitude}, #{item.dataSource}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stock_daily_data WHERE stock_code=#{stockCode} AND trade_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY trade_date ASC
SELECT * FROM stock_daily_data WHERE stock_code=#{stockCode} ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM stock_daily_data WHERE stock_code=#{stockCode}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM stock_daily_data WHERE stock_code=#{stockCode} AND trade_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_daily_data WHERE stock_code=#{stockCode}
